summary: Completed testing of new DOCX export feature. All 51 backend tests pass (100%) including 4 new DOCX export tests. Frontend DOCX export buttons verified in both ReportView and BarristerView - buttons visible, clickable, and successfully trigger Word document downloads.

docx_export_backend.details: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/export-docx endpoint working correctly. Returns valid DOCX file with correct MIME type (application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document). File contains styled headings, case info table, grounds of merit with legal references, and full analysis.

docx_export_content.details: DOCX file structure verified: contains JUSTITIA AI header, case information table, GROUNDS OF MERIT section, LEGAL FRAMEWORK REFERENCE section, DETAILED ANALYSIS section, and footer disclaimer.

docx_export_reportview_button.details: Export Word button (data-testid='export-docx-btn') visible in ReportView header. Button styled with blue background. Clicking triggers DOCX download with toast notification 'Word document downloaded successfully!'

docx_export_barristerview_button.details: Word button (data-testid='export-docx-btn') visible in BarristerView header. Button styled with blue border. Clicking triggers DOCX download.

docx_filename.details: Downloaded file has correct naming convention: '{case_title}_{report_type}.docx' (e.g., 'PDF Test Case_quick_summary.docx')
